title: Strong Paper Plates (9 Inch / 50-Pack) 100% Compostable Heavy-Duty Eco-Friendly Disposable Bagasse Plates, Made of Natural Sugarcane Fibers – 9" Biodegradable Paper Plate
features: ✔ 9 inch Paper Plates: Serve Appetizers or Desserts in Convenient Style Compostable Food Plates. Perfect to serve at your Parties. The Biodegradable Plates makes a Great Choice for your Daily Meals or Restaurants, Food Trucks, To-go Orders, Special Events, and other types of Food Service Environments.

✔ 100% Sugarcane Fiber: The Nine inch Plate is Made of 100% Sugarcane Fiber, a Sustainable, Renewable, and Biodegradable Material. A great Alternative to Traditional Paper or Plastic, the Disposable Plate Offers the same Sturdy Function and Easy Cleanup, Yet it’s Completely Tree- and Plastic-free.

✔ 100% Compostable: Since it’s Made from 100% Sugarcane Fiber, the Plate can be Commercially Composted (no need to send it to a landfill). The Plate offers a Disposable Design that will Degrade Quickly, which means Convenient Cleanup for You, your Customers, and the Planet. This Product Meets ASTM D6400 or D6868 and is Intended to be Composted in a Municipal or Commercial Facility Operated in Accordance with Best Composting Management practices.

✔ Hot or Cold Use: These Plates can be used for Hot or Cold Food Items. It offers Reliable Strength and Does Not contain any Plastic or Wax Lining. These Plates are Microwavable & Freezable. Oil and Cut-resistant Note: Hot Foods can cause the plates to perspire and condensation to form at the bottom.

✔ Perfect for Any Occasion: With a wide range of products and a classic design, Ask Packaging provides premium environmental -friendly products and peace of mind that you are providing all-natural organic tableware for your family and friends. Perfect for Camping, Picnics, Lunches, Catering, BBQs, Events, Parties, Weddings and Restaurants.
description: Product Description STRONG DISPOSABLE PLATES ASK PACKAGING HEAVY-DUTY DISPOSABLE PLATES Heavy-Duty Strong Disposable Plates By ASK PACKAGING - The Guilt-Free Way To Enjoy The Convenience Of Single-Use Plates Parties, Home Use & More! Hosting a big party or gathering without any disposable dinnerware looks like an impossible feat. Yet, that doesn't mean that ending up with a ton of plastic plates or bamboo plates or palm leaf plates is an acceptable solution, especially as those take up to 4 centuries to decompose. Discover The Best, Fully Natural Bagasse Plates - The Ultimate Alternative To Damaging Plastic Or Flimsy Paper Plates! Expertly designed to completely replace all those disposable plastic plates and reusable plates that end up polluting our landfills, these innovative lunch, dinner, and dessert plates are made of natural sugarcane or bagasse that leaves no trace behind! Along with their durable and sturdy design, they make a wonderful choice for any food, dessert, or snack, including burgers, tacos, steaks, sandwiches, noodles, curry dishes, salads, salsas, dips, chips, snacks, fruits, desserts, pizza, and all type of hot and cold foods. Food-safe, unbleached, and with a natural earthly charm, they make a safe and beautiful addition to any home gathering or professional setting. 7 INCH DISPOSABLE PLATES · Material: Made of Sugarcane Fiber or 100% natural Bagasse, Tree-free, Plastic-free. · Heavy-duty: Freeze and Microwave Safe, Heat-resistance, Oil-resistance, and Cut-resistance. · Food Grade: BPA-free, Wax-free, Gluten-free. · Package: Different sets of 7 inch diposable plate are available like 50-Pack, 100-Pack, 150-Pack, 300-Pack, and 500-Pack. · No trees are harmed or cut down. 9 INCH STRON DISPOSABLE PLATES · Material: Made of Sugarcane Fiber or 100% natural Bagasse, Tree-free, Plastic-free. · Heavy-duty: Freeze and Microwave Safe, Heat-resistance, Oil-resistance, and Cut-resistance. · Food Grade: BPA-free, Wax-free, Gluten-free. · Package: Different sets of 9 inch diposable plate are available like 50-Pack, 100-Pack, 150-Pack, 300-Pack, and 500-Pack. · No trees are harmed or cut down. 10 INCH DISPOSABLE PLATES · Material: Made of Sugarcane Fiber or 100% natural Bagasse, Tree-free, Plastic-free. · Heavy-duty: Freeze and Microwave Safe, Heat-resistance, Oil-resistance, and Cut-resistance. · Food Grade : BPA-free, Wax-free, Gluten-free. · Package: Set includes 50 pack 10 inch plate. · No trees are harmed or cut down. ALL ROUND DISPOSABLE BAGASSE PLATES SAVE THE PLANET Made of excellent quality natural sugarcane. Ask Packaging bagasse dinnerware helps protect the planet we live in, as it won’t end up polluting our environment with more plastic. Plus, sugarcane makes a smart, tree-free, renewable and sustainable solution that can revolutionize the way we use single-use bowls, plates and containers. MICROWAVABLE & FREEZER SAFE With a durable, leak-proof and sturdy quality, Ask Packaging disposable sugarcane plates can be popped in the microwave to heat any goodies without any issues whatsoever. Freezer safe and suitable for hot and cold uses, they are so handy and convenient that you won't stop using them. Great also for storing and reheating leftovers! IDEAL FOR HOT & COLD FOODS Serving some yummy hot tacos or some refreshingly cold ice cream? Ask Packaging durable, leak-proof throw-away disposable plates you can safely serve your family or guests anything you can think of. With zero wax lining, zero bleaching and zero nasty fillers, our all-natural, food-safe party plates are the most sustainable choice you can make! [Available in 3 sizes: 7”, 9”, 10”] STURDY & DURABLE Ask Packaging disposable plates to hold up when you’re serving everyday meals and snacks. Made strong with attractive designs, Ask Packaging offers reliable performance and durability. Great for meals, snacks, casual get-togethers, outdoor picnics, or family events, Ask Packaging plates are ease the clean up so you can focus on food, family, friends, and what’s important. 100% BAGASSE PAPER PLATES MADE OF NATURAL SUGARCANE FIBER Ask Packaging's tableware range is made from something that is often referred to as ‘bagasse’. Bagasse is the dry pulpy fibrous material that is left as a byproduct of juicing sugarcane. When this material is densely compressed, we can create all kinds of things, such as non-toxic, environmentally safe tableware. It’s great because not only is it a completely natural material, but it’s also commercially sustainable due to it being a byproduct of another process. Ask Packaging sugarcane plates are perfect for all kinds of events, such as BBQs and picnics. They’re a fantastic alternative to many other types of disposable tableware like plastic plates, styrofoam plates, etc. which are often deceptively unrecyclable. Be the change you wish to see, make it Ask Packaging. Protect our planet, low carbon, prevent deforestation, and prevent GLOBAL WARMING ..!! It was thoughtfully designed to improve and help maintain waste management. The disposable plate is made of sugarcane fiber and is safe for health and the environment. A way to help preserve our earth while providing natural, pleasant, and reliable products. ASK PACKAGING PLATES - SUITABLE FOR ALL OCCASION VERSATILE AND MULTI-PURPOSE - PERFECT FOR ALL KINDS OF PARTIES AND EVENTS With ASK PACKAGING's disposable and 100% bagasse plates host your most glamorous events with the greatest respect for nature! Your guest will love this simple yet elegant look as well as be inspired by your eco choices. Whether you are hosting a wedding, a BBQ, a friendly get-together, a picnic, camping, or a birthday party, these plates are sure to fit your needs!
